entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 50
entries.excerpt: Jacob, having blessed his sons, died at the age of one hundred and forty-seven years. Joseph came with the elders of Egypt and with all the household of his father, and they buried Jacob with his fathers. Then Joseph and all those with him returned to Egypt. The brothers feared Joseph, and said: “Thy father charged us before his death to say unto thee: Forgive… the trespass and the sin of thy brethren, in that they did evil unto thee… And Joseph wept… Fear not me (Gen 50:16–17, 19). Though your father is dead, the God of your father is alive.…
